topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules for scheduling the on/off states of various appliances and devices, primarily focusing on energy management through timed control of smart plugs and switches.

rows.if_then_rule: IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN turn off plug using Smappee for office equipment in the evening on working days and turn off all appliances connected to the selected plug every Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday at the selected time.
IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN switch off SmartThings light at 11pm on weekdays.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN toggle Sleep mode using EZVIZ to turn off Sleep Mode in the morning.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn on Leeo Smart Alert lights at a certain time of day and select the time every day that you want your Leeo Smart Alert to turn off automatically.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN switch off a light using SmartThings.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn off light using SmartThings at 7:30am.
IF every Saturday at 8:30 local time THEN start Earth Hour by turning your things off.
IF every day of the week at 09:00 AM on Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri THEN switch off water heater using SmartThings.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN trigger WEMO Switches - ON at specified times automatically.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn off D-Link smart plug.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn off lamp using WIFIPLUG.
IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN turn a WeMo Switch on or off at specific times throughout the week.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn off SmartThings smartbulb.
IF body scale weight measurement rises above a configured threshold THEN turn off using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF sleep duration is below a configured threshold THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug to put on a pot of coffee.
IF every hour at a configured threshold THEN turn off using D-Link Smart Plug.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN run SmartThings routines at a particular time.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn hot water off using Honeywell evohome.
IF every hour at a configured threshold THEN turn off using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every day at 2pm THEN turn off spa using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF body scale weight measurement rises above a configured threshold THEN turn off using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN turn off cat feeder using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN shut off gas water heater via WeMo at 8pm.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn on coffee maker using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN turn off Super Feeder using WeMo Smart Plug at specific times.
IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN switch on a Smappee plug.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn on coffee pot using SmartThings.
IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN turn on bedroom lights using WeMo Lighting.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn on bathroom heater using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF switched off from WeMo Smart Plug THEN quick add event using Google Calendar.
IF switched on from WeMo Smart Plug THEN quick add event using Google Calendar.
IF switched off from WeMo Smart Plug THEN quick add event using Google Calendar to log electricity usage.
IF switched off from WeMo Smart Plug THEN quick add event using Google Calendar to log system off.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN switch off chandelier using SmartThings.
IF every weekday morning at 7:00 THEN turn on bedside lamp using WeMo Lighting.
IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN turn on light using WeMo Light Switch at 6:30 A.M.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn on your heater using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn off front porch light using WeMo Light Switch at 9:00 PM.
IF every day at 1:00 AM THEN turn off WeMo light switch.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn off a WeMo switch at a specified time.
IF every year on a configured threshold THEN turn off all WeMo Light Switches for Earth Hour.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn off SmartThings Outlet.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn off something using SmartThings.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn on light using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn on Christmas tree lights using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every day at 1:00 PM THEN turn on spa using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every night at 8:30 PM THEN turn off lamp using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every day of the week at 2:00 AM THEN switch off WeMo's if still ON.
IF every Friday at 9:00 PM THEN turn off Zoll TV2.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn on fan using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN switch all security on using Wattio GATE when all family members left home in the morning.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN switch all security off using Wattio GATE when family members return home after work.

IF every day at 3:00 AM THEN turn on WeMo using WeMo Smart Plug.

IF every day at a configured threshold THEN wake me up with light in the morning using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every hour at a configured threshold THEN power cycle the WeMo Smart Plug.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn on chandelier using SmartThings.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN turn on Christmas tree using WeMo Smart Plug.
